title: Optimal Eat
description: Automatically stops eating when you've fully used an item to minimize eating slowdown.
body:
# **Optimal Eat mod**

This mod automatically stops eating once you've fully used an item.

In vanilla minecraft, you can continually eating a food item, even when you've fully used it and you only stop once you receive a packet from the server (which can take a bit of time as many high ping players know).

This mod was specifically designed for pvp gamemodes like UHC, OP and DiamondPot where eating downtime needs to be at a minimum!

Below is a showcase of Optimal Eat, it was produced on 1200ms to exaggerate the effect.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BRbcV3WhFuE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(More previews are in the gallery, and don't forget to check out [Tektonikal](https://modrinth.com/user/Tektonikal))

## Dependencies

This mod requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.
